reasons: apply_install_plan allows duplicate target paths in one plan
duplicate actions overwrite within the same apply operation
required kimi_log.md and kimi_report.json are missing for round_016
CLI real writes remain disabled and existing tests pass, so a narrow fix is appropriate

findings.issue: Duplicate target paths in the same plan are not detected during preflight, allowing the second write to overwrite the first.
findings.required_fix: Track resolved targets during preflight and reject duplicates before any file is written.

findings.issue: Required Kimi artifacts kimi_log.md and kimi_report.json are missing.
findings.required_fix: Round 017 must produce the standard log/report artifacts.

verification.manual_repro: Two create actions for dup.md result in dup.md containing the second content instead of failing preflight.
verification.cli_exposure: No user-facing real install write behavior exposed

batch_decision.reason: Write helper bug requires a narrow same-tier fix before any further installer work.
